message:
fix(conformance): update pubsub/shutdown fixtures for concurrent agent changes

- pubsub_unknown_subcommand: expect "ERR syntax error" (TurquoiseBluff)
- pubsub_help: use any_array (help text expanded with SHARDCHANNELS/SHARDNUMSUB)
- shutdown_invalid_flag: expect "ERR syntax error" (validation tightened)
- Commit concurrent work: SLOWLOG parity, BGSAVE/SHUTDOWN validation,
  CLIENT LIST TYPE/ID filtering, PUBSUB HELP expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
